pattern: With only one reversal of a prefix or suffix allowed, the small candidate set can be enumerated to pick the lexicographic minimum.
hints: Exactly one operation is performed, so the set of reachable strings is limited.
Each operation is determined by a choice of length k and whether it touches the front or the back, giving on the order of 2n candidates.
Generate every prefix reversal and every suffix reversal, compare them as strings, and return the smallest.

edge_inputs.description: already sorted, best is to reverse length one
single character forces the only operation
all same characters leaves it unchanged

stress.description: random strings over a small alphabet to force ties and tricky reversals
